exports.import_notes: Double membrane, lumen accents, and envelope panels.
Pore rings and selective gate cores as one package.
Transparent nucleoplasm volume and suspended readable detail.
Selective import/export teaching particles and path cues.
Rough ER bridge, folded sheets, ribosomes, and lumen ribbons.
Small marker meshes for root/socket import; assembly converts these to metadata.

excluded_object_rules: objects whose names start with Reference_, Camera_, or Label_
